AxisMember.description: A dimension placed on an axis with its selection and per-axis options.
AxisMember.title: AxisMember

note.default: Structural only — no data value is retrieved.
note.title: Note

CellOverride.description: A per-cell edit produced by an inline prompt in the artifact panel.
CellOverride.title: CellOverride

ChatAction.description:
A clickable option. Clicking records ``value`` as a normal user message
(spec section 8), keeping the conversation reproducible.
ChatAction.title: ChatAction

ChatBlock.description: Generic typed block envelope carried inside an assistant message.
ChatBlock.title: ChatBlock

ConditionalRule.description: A conditional-formatting rule applied to a cell's numeric value.
ConditionalRule.title: ConditionalRule

MemberMatch.description: A resolved member with provenance (spec section 19).
MemberMatch.title: MemberMatch

MemberSelection.description:
A single member-selection expression.

Modelled as one flat object (rather than a discriminated union) so the
generated TypeScript stays a single editable interface. A validator enforces
the fields required by each ``type``.
MemberSelection.title: MemberSelection

NegativeStyle.description: How negative numbers render (Oracle Smart Formatting).
NegativeStyle.title: NegativeStyle

columnLabel.description: Target column label for cell scope
columnLabel.title: Columnlabel

rowLabel.description: Target row label for cell scope
rowLabel.title: Rowlabel

preview.description: Fresh preview for the updated spec
preview.title: Preview

ReferenceTemplate.description: Where the form is derived from (spec section 23).
ReferenceTemplate.title: ReferenceTemplate

ReportGrid.description: One grid within a report. Reuses the form axis model for resolution.
ReportGrid.title: ReportGrid

SmartFormat.description: Oracle-EPM-style number formatting for a grid, column or single cell.
SmartFormat.title: SmartFormat

SnapshotAnalysis.description: Deterministic inventory of an LCM application-snapshot zip.
SnapshotAnalysis.title: SnapshotAnalysis

SnapshotProvenance.description: Who/when/where a snapshot was exported (from the LCM Import.xml).
SnapshotProvenance.title: SnapshotProvenance
